since_last: 52% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.83%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 52% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC -0.97% · Gold +0.55% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 52% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.83%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.83%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.51%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: LRCX is the standout at -6.82%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +3.81%, NOW +3.59%, SAP +2.88%, INTU +2.86%, WDAY +2.54%. Laggards: LRCX -6.82%, AMAT -6.43%, TER -6.16%, KLAC -5.64%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.47% at $159.66
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.47% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
